ddls:
CREATE TABLE "butterfly_sightings" (
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sighting */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species observed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the sighting */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the sighting */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the sighting */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the sighting */,
  "week_day" INTEGER /* Day of the week (1-7, where 1 is Monday) */,
  "week_since" INTEGER /* Week number since the start of the observation period */,
  "trim_week_no" INTEGER /* Trimmed week number */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "complete_season" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the season is complete (0 for incomplete, 1 for complete) */,
  "anchor" INTEGER /* Anchor point for the observation period */,
  "nm" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks (nullable) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the sighting was made */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who made the sighting */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the sighting was made */,
  "sighting_source" TEXT /* Source of the sighting (e.g., field observation, citizen science project) */,
  "sighting_method" TEXT /* Method used for the sighting (e.g., net, camera) */,
  "sighting_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sighting (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "sighting_certainty" TEXT /* Certainty of the sighting (e.g., confirmed, probable, possible) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_butterfly_sightings_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_butterfly_sightings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_butterfly_sightings_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_butterfly_sightings_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species (e.g., endangered, vulnerable, least concern) */,
  "diet" TEXT /* Diet of the species */,
  "habitat_preferences" TEXT /* Preferred habitats of the species */,
  "life_cycle" TEXT /* Life cycle of the species */,
  "migration_patterns" TEXT /* Migration patterns of the species */,
  "geographical_distribution" TEXT /* Geographical distribution of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., Spring, Summer) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the season */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the season */,
  "average_precipitation" REAL /* Average precipitation during the season */,
  "daylight_hours" REAL /* Average daylight hours during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat at the location */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation at the location */,
  "water_sources" TEXT /* Types of water sources available at the location */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation event */,
  "sighting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sighting associated with the observation */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the observation was conducted */,
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observer who conducted the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation (e.g., sunny, rainy) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the observation */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the observation was made */,
  "observation_duration" REAL /* Duration of the observation in minutes */,
  "number_of_individuals" INTEGER /* Number of individuals observed */,
  "behavior" TEXT /* Behavior of the butterflies during the observation */,
  "observation_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the observation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_observer_id FOREIGN KEY ("observer_id") REFERENCES observers ("observer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_sighting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sighting_id") REFERENCES butterfly_sightings ("sighting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observers" (
  "observer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observer */,
  "observer_name" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the observer */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the observer belongs to */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise or specialization of the observer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the observer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the observer */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the observer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation event */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity in percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in millimeters */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in hPa */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habitat_data" (
  "habitat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habitat event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation event */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., meadow, forest) */,
  "vegetation_density" TEXT /* Density of vegetation (e.g., sparse, dense) */,
  "water_presence" TEXT /* Presence of water (e.g., river, pond) */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil (e.g., sandy, clay) */,
  "vegetation_type" TEXT /* Type of vegetation (e.g., grasses, flowers) */,
  "water_sources" TEXT /* Types of water sources available (e.g., river, pond) */,
  "soil_moisture" TEXT /* Soil moisture level (e.g., dry, moist, wet) */,
  "light_conditions" TEXT /* Light conditions (e.g., sunny, shaded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habitat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_habitat_data_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., CSV, JPEG, PDF) */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the file content */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
